title: podocarpus latior
intro: Podocarpus latior, also known as the New Zealand fern tree or latior, is a species of coniferous tree native to New Zealand. It is a type of conifer that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Podocarpus latior include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Podocarpus latior can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
